name: Sample Data Upload
description: Upload 17 CSV sample data files (Finance, HR, Operations) to BronzeLH Lakehouse Files/ area via OneLake DFS API for the Horizon Books demo.

tasks.name: Authenticate OneLake
tasks.description: Obtain Azure Storage access token for OneLake DFS API via Get-AzAccessToken -ResourceTypeName Storage.

tasks.name: Create Files Directory
tasks.description: Create the Files/ directory structure in BronzeLH via idempotent PUT ?resource=directory on OneLake DFS endpoint.

tasks.name: Upload Finance CSVs
tasks.description: Upload 4 Finance CSV files (DimAccounts, DimCostCenters, FactFinancialTransactions, FactBudget) to BronzeLH Files/Finance/ via PUT/PATCH/PATCH (create/append/flush).

tasks.name: Upload HR CSVs
tasks.description: Upload 5 HR CSV files (DimEmployees, DimDepartments, FactPayroll, FactPerformanceReviews, FactRecruitment) to BronzeLH Files/HR/.

tasks.name: Upload Operations CSVs
tasks.description: Upload 8 Operations CSV files (DimBooks, DimAuthors, DimCustomers, DimGeography, DimWarehouses, FactOrders, FactInventory, FactReturns) to BronzeLH Files/Operations/.
